metadata.name: Browser capture workspace operation (valid)
metadata.description: Conformance fixture: a scoped browser capture operation using explicit-urls capture mode. No whole-history capture. Emits browser.capture.evidence. BearBrowser integration target.

steps.name: emit-policy-gate
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops policy-gate record --operation-id op-002 --policy sourceos.browser.capture.admission --result allow

steps.name: open-browser-session
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops browser-session open --operation-id op-002 --capture-scope explicit-urls --urls 'https://docs.sourceos.io/workspace-ops'

steps.name: capture-page
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops web-capture take --session-id sess-002 --url 'https://docs.sourceos.io/workspace-ops' --format screenshot-png

steps.name: emit-browser-capture-evidence
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops evidence emit --operation-id op-002 --kind browser.capture.evidence --session-id sess-002
